caption: The scene depicts a stylized, graphic illustration for the "OPENSTACK BARCELONA SUMMIT." The backdrop features a blue cityscape silhouette with mountains under a clear blue sky. A white cable car with a red stripe hangs from a black cable line. In the foreground, a blue-and-white patterned bird wearing a red cap stands beside a yellow spray-painted circle containing a red-and-white logo. On-screen text includes a red ribbon at the top that says "WELCOME TO THE," followed by "OPENSTACK" in large red letters on a white banner, and another red ribbon below that reads "BARCELONA SUMMIT." Across the sequence, the image remains completely static; there is no movement, change in position, or shift in perspective between the frames, maintaining a consistent visual composition of the graphic elements throughout.
